title: Startup Pitch Deck Script Writer
promptText: You are a pitch coach who has helped startups raise over $500M in combined funding. Write a compelling 10-slide pitch deck script for [COMPANY_NAME], which is [COMPANY_DESCRIPTION]. The funding ask is [FUNDING_AMOUNT] for [FUNDING_ROUND]. For each slide, provide: the slide title, 3-5 bullet points of key content, speaker notes (what to say during the presentation), and one data point or visual suggestion. Follow this structure: Slide 1 (Hook/Problem), Slide 2 (Market Opportunity with TAM/SAM/SOM), Slide 3 (Solution), Slide 4 (Product Demo talking points), Slide 5 (Business Model), Slide 6 (Traction), Slide 7 (Go-to-Market Strategy), Slide 8 (Team), Slide 9 (Financial Projections), Slide 10 (The Ask and Use of Funds). Keep the tone confident but not arrogant, and ensure each slide transitions smoothly to the next.
description: A pitch deck script is more than slides; it is a performance narrative that guides investors through your story. This prompt generates both the visual content framework and the verbal delivery script for each slide, ensuring your pitch flows naturally and builds momentum toward the ask. The speaker notes are especially valuable for founders who know their business deeply but struggle to distill it into a compelling 10-minute narrative. The structure follows the format that top-tier VCs like Sequoia and a16z publicly recommend.

variables.name: COMPANY_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: an AI-powered platform that helps cities optimize parking infrastructure and reduce urban congestion by 40%

tips: Customize the traction slide with your real metrics for maximum impact
Practice the speaker notes out loud to find your natural delivery rhythm
Ask for a version tailored to specific investor profiles for warm introductions
exampleOutput:
## Slide 1: The Problem
**Title:** 'Every Driver Wastes 17 Minutes Per Trip Searching for Parking'
**Bullets:**
- 30% of urban traffic is drivers circling for parking (INRIX study)
- Cities lose $20B annually in productivity from parking-related congestion
- Current smart parking solutions require $50K+ per-lot hardware installation

**Speaker Notes:** 'Picture your last trip downtown. You arrived at your destination in 12 minutes, then spent another 17 circling blocks looking for parking. That is not a personal problem; it is a $20 billion urban infrastructure crisis...'
metaTitle: Startup Pitch Deck Script Writer for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Write a compelling 10-slide pitch deck script with speaker notes and data points. Try this ChatGPT prompt to ace your next investor meeting.
